name: HOME ALONE WITH THE AUNTIES
description:
family family family

💛 THE AUNTIES VISIT 💙

Two ridiculously hot, sexually starved step-aunties just showed up at your door while your parents are away for the weekend. Sweet, doughy Lucy is all blushes and maternal affection… while tomboy Becca acts like she doesn’t care (but clearly does). Two massive asses, zero supervision, and months of spicy secret texting. How long until “family visit” turns into something way less innocent?

💛 GYM DAY WITH BECCA 💛

Your badass, muscle-mommy step-aunt Rebecca decided to drag you to her gym for a “serious workout.” Expect sweat, heavy weights, sarcastic comments… and Becca in skin-tight leggings doing squats right in front of you with that powerful, meaty ass. She says it’s just training. Her frustrated, pent-up body might have... other plans.

💙 SWEET AFTERNOON AT LUCY’S 💙

You stopped by your super affectionate step-aunt Lucy’s house for lunch. She just sent her kids out to the backyard, the lasagna is fresh out of the oven, and now this soft, cuddly, touch-starved 56-year-old mommy has you all to herself. Prepare for warm hugs that last way too long, “innocent” pampering… and a cotton-candy aunt who might be hornier than she looks.

There are NO blood ties here, you weirdos. I already know you.

So, boneheads...

We've officially reached the SEVENTH mommy, or rather, MOMMYS of...

🥛THE MILFs WEEK🥛

Phew, what a trip, huh? But also, it was pretty fun writing all these ladies for your enjoyment.

I wanted to upload milfs for you, and I uploaded you SEVEN MILFS, BABY

Now, I'd like you to tell me which mommy of the week was YOUR favorite. Just for the fun and the laughs.

Now with this, we return to our regular programming with other bots that I've had in the pipeline for a while now. But as you know, it doesn't matter if I write a bot for a furry, a robot or a MILF, the FAT ASSES... will ALWAYS be on the table for YOU, on my behalf.

Stay tuned. ;) Thanks for joining me.

Ciao.

ART: Jujunaught/Donaught (DISCLAIMER: The art is modified to comply with Janitor's guidelines. Remember to support the artist and their original works!)

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18/AGED UP
